notes: All acceptance criteria met. The reasoning.db schema includes beliefs, reasoning_traces, and review_queue tables with proper indexes. N5BeliefStore supports full CRUD operations with automatic HITL queueing for low-confidence beliefs (< 0.6). SurprisalDetector correctly triggers on similarity < 0.3 and no_results conditions. All traces can be logged and queried. Export snapshot functionality works correctly. Database initialization script created at /tmp/init_reasoning_db.py for reference.
